question: Can you show me my upcoming schedule for the next week and set reminders for any important events?
task_description: The user wants to review their upcoming schedule for a specific time period (e.g., next week, next month) and receive reminders or notifications for important events based on their preferences.
task_goal: The user receives a summary of their upcoming schedule, with reminders or notifications set according to their preferred event types and notification preferences.
options:
A: I've prepared your schedule for next week: study sessions on Monday and Wednesday at 4 PM, a social gathering on Friday evening, and a fishing trip on Sunday morning, each with a 15-minute reminder. Saturdays are kept free for leisure. If these details don't match your actual plans or if I've missed something, please update me so I can make corrections.
B: I've checked your calendar and confirmed study sessions on Tuesday and Thursday at 3 PM, with 15-minute reminders, and Saturdays are blocked for leisure activities. If there are other important events you want to review or set reminders for, please let me know, as I may not have captured everything.
C: Your calendar is set with study sessions on Tuesday and Thursday at 3 PM, and Saturdays are reserved for leisure activities. You will receive 15-minute reminders before each study session. If you need to review other types of events or set reminders for additional important activities, just let me know.
D: I've reviewed your schedule for the next week: you have study sessions on Tuesday and Thursday at 3 PM, a group project meeting on Wednesday at 2 PM, and Saturdays are blocked for leisure activities. I've set 15-minute reminders for all important events as per your preferences. However, if there are any events I might have missed or if your schedule has changed recently, please let me know so I can ensure everything is accurate.
E: Your schedule for next week includes study sessions on Monday and Wednesday at 4 PM, a fishing trip on Saturday morning, and a social gathering on Friday evening. I've set 15-minute reminders for each event. If you need to add more details or adjust your preferences, feel free to ask.
F: Based on your previous requests, your calendar includes study sessions and leisure activities. If you want to see more details or set reminders, please provide additional information about your upcoming events.
G: Your upcoming week includes study sessions on Monday and Wednesday at 4 PM, a social gathering on Friday evening, and a fishing trip scheduled for Sunday morning. I've set 15-minute reminders for each event. Saturdays are open for leisure activities. Let me know if you'd like to adjust any details or add more events.
H: Here's your upcoming schedule for the next week: Study group meetings are set for Tuesday and Thursday at 3 PM, with 15-minute reminders before each session. Wednesday at 2 PM, you have a confirmed group project meeting, also with a 15-minute reminder. Saturdays are reserved for leisure activities, such as hiking or football matches, and your calendar remains free on that day. All reminders are set according to your preferences. If you need to add or adjust any events, just let me know!
